Notes: Single UPDATE attempts to create a CNAME RRset and an A RRset at the same owner name in one atomic message, with no prerequisites, to probe whether the server rejects the conflict or applies one/both RRsets.

Steps.Description: Add a CNAME and an A RR at the same owner name in one UPDATE.

Steps.Name: cnamehost.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the CNAME RRset exists after the update.

Steps.Name: cnamehost.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset exists after the update.
